languages.text: {n}Хейнрикс морщится от слов контрабандистки. Но молчит.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Хейнрикс морщится от слов контрабандистки. Но молчит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Heinrix zieht bei den Worten des Schmugglers die Stirn in Falten, sagt aber nichts.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Heinrix fronce les sourcils aux paroles du contrebandier, mais ne dit rien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}海因瑞克斯听了走私者的话，眉头紧皱，但什么也没说。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Heinrix frunce el ceño ante las palabras del contrabandista, pero no dice nada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ハインリックスは密輸業者の言葉に眉をひそめたが、何も言わなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Heinrix kaçakçının sözleri karşısında kaşlarını çatar ama bir şey söylemez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Heinrix knits his brow at the smuggler's words but says nothing.{/n}
